pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version is not updated to match the JDK 21 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.6 to 2.7.18 to support JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.6.x does not support JDK 21; upgrading is required for compatibility.
